title: Light Up The Way - Emissive Amendments
description: Adds shader support to amendments wall lanterns!
body:
# Light Up The Way

For some reason, some wall lanterns from Amendments don't glow when using shaders. This pack fixes that!

## FAQ

### Can I use Light Up The Way in my modpack?

Of course! Just don't claim that you made it and the modpack needs to be on modrinth.

### Can you add support for this block?
You can request it in the feature requests channel in the support discord: https://discord.gg/T9cNptzn8z

### I found a bug, where do I report it?
You can report it in the bug reports channel in the support discord: https://discord.gg/T9cNptzn8z


## Requirements:

[![Continuity Required](https://github.com/WooleyMoley/Requirements/blob/main/Continuity.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

[![Iris Required](https://github.com/WooleyMoley/Requirements/blob/main/Iris.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)

[![Amendments Required](https://github.com/WooleyMoley/Requirements/blob/main/Amendments.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments)
